---
title: "UNdata"
page-layout: article
---

# UNdata

**Provider:** United Nations

## Description

United Nations statistical portal combining data from multiple UN databases. Supports cross-national research on demographics, economics, development, environment, and society.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Government & International Statistics, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://data.un.org/Default.aspx)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
